# Capacitiq Solutions (Pty) Ltd
# www.capacitiq.co.za

## About

Capacitiq is a multidisciplinary business support agency registered in South Africa (Reg. 2026/344156/07). B-BBEE Level 1 Contributor. We offer five service pillars: Business Strategy and Operations, Marketing and Growth, Public Relations, Virtual Assistance, and Graphic Design. We also offer a Canva template shop and publish business insights on our blog.

## Key pages

- Home: https://capacitiq.co.za
- Services: https://capacitiq.co.za/services
- Templates: https://capacitiq.co.za/templates
- Blog: https://capacitiq.co.za/blog
- Portfolio: https://capacitiq.co.za/portfolio
- Careers: https://capacitiq.co.za/careers
- Contact: https://capacitiq.co.za/contact
- Company: https://capacitiq.co.za/company
